title: runtime_realization_receipt.v1
description: Realization receipt returned by the Keyhole Test Runtime. Compatible with both the simple SDK form and the reference bridge contract.

digest.description: The candidate digest that was realized.

result.description: Same value as status — used by the reference bridge contract.

message.description: Human-readable description of the realization result.

realized_at.description: Timestamp of when the realization was processed.

governance_verdict.description: Governance verdict from MCP governance or local-only mode.

version.description: Runtime version at time of realization.
